title: China 2010 township population census data with GIS maps 2010中国人口普查乡镇资料与地图 on CD
current_description: SearchWorks is Stanford University Libraries' online catalog, providing access to books, journals, databases, digital collections, and special collections with significant holdings in Chinese and East...
source_text:
China 2010 township population census data with GIS maps [electronic resource].
Description
- Language
- English, Chinese. Selected attribute data and metadata in English and Chinese.
- Imprint
- [Beijing] : All China Marketing Research Co. ; Ann Arbor, MI : Distributed by University of Michigan, China Data Center, [2013]
Creators/Contributors
Contents/Summary
- Summary
- Includes 2010 township GIS maps with about about 11 attribute variables from 2010 population Census data for all townships (Jiedao, Zhen and Xiang) of Mainland China. The GIS map layers include: (1) 2010 township map with population Census data variables (1:100 million); (2) Highway; (3) National Road; (4) Provincial Trunk Road; (5) Railways; (6) Rivers; and (7) Coast lines.

title: Tang dai mu zhi ming 唐代墓志铭数据库 (Tang Dynasty Epitaph Database)
source_text:
Tang dai mu zhi ming shu ju ku

- Responsibility

Creators/Contributors
Contents/Summary
- Summary
- Detailed summary in vernacular field
"《唐代墓志铭数据库》彭兴林主编, 是利用数字化形态实现并且带有古籍整理成果的隋唐五代时期墓志文献数据库. 本數據庫文, 圖兼收, 對原文進行標點, 分段, 並實現全文檢索. 全面的收集, 整合隋唐五代各類墓誌文獻, 利用已經搜集到的石刻拓片和已公開傳世古籍以及已經出版整理的古籍(如各類全集, 金石志等)等, 不斷完善數據庫內容"--Database home page

Contents/Summary
- Summary
- Taiwan nichinichi shinpo, daily newspaper, was published from 1898 to 1944 in Japanese along with Chinese text from 1905 to 1911. It is an official newspaper published by the Government-General of Taiwan yet one of the dispensable resources to know the condition of Taiwan for these years. The database provides both Chinese and Japanese interface

Guo jia she hui ke xue ji jin xiang mu shu ju = Chinese National Foundation Project Data : 1991-2019

Contents/Summary
- Summary
- The Chinese National Foundation Project Data was released on the Chinese Open Data Platform (CnOpenData). The dataset includes information about all Chinese government funded research projects in the social sciences and humanities from 1991-2019
